Lake Hume Resort

Your Peaceful Escape at Lake Hume

Wake up to fresh country air and stunning water views. Whether you're after a quiet weekend for two or an action-packed family holiday, we have the perfect space for you — just minutes from Albury and Wodonga.

Motel Rooms King Deluxe Twin Room Triple Room Lakeside Cottages 2-Bedroom Cottage 3-Bedroom Cottage
Motel Accommodation

Comfortable Motel Rooms

Our motel rooms offer a cosy, convenient space to rest after a busy day exploring. Designed with your comfort in mind, each room features a private bathroom, tea and coffee making facilities, a flat-screen TV, and easy access to our resort pool and mini-golf.

Motel Room

King Deluxe Room

Unwind in Style

Our King Deluxe Room is perfect for solo travellers or couples seeking extra comfort. Stretch out on a plush king-size bed after a day on the water, with thoughtful touches that make every stay memorable.

  • Deluxe king-size bedding with premium linens
  • Private ensuite with complimentary toiletries
  • Flat-screen TV & air conditioning
  • Tea & coffee station
  • Access to resort pool & BBQ facilities
  • Close to mini-golf and gardens
Check Availability Enquire Now
Motel Room

Twin Room

Flexible Comfort for Friends & Families

Travelling with friends or need flexible sleeping arrangements? Our Twin Room features two cosy single beds with all the same comforting amenities — an ideal base for exploring Lake Hume's activities.

  • Two comfortable single beds
  • Private ensuite with toiletries
  • Flat-screen TV & air conditioning
  • Heating for cooler nights
  • Easy access to all resort amenities
  • Steps from the pool & recreation areas
Check Availability Enquire Now
Motel Room

Triple Room

Space for Everyone

The Triple Room provides everything you need for a relaxing and convenient group stay. With three comfortable beds, this room is perfect for small families or groups of friends keen to enjoy all Lake Hume has to offer.

  • Three beds for flexible sleeping arrangements
  • Ensuite bathroom with complimentary toiletries
  • Air conditioning & heating
  • Flat-screen TV & entertainment
  • Steps from pool & mini-golf
  • Easy access to all recreation areas
Check Availability Enquire Now
Self-Contained Accommodation

Lakeside Cottages

Experience the ultimate family getaway in our beautiful lakeside cottages. Spacious two- and three-bedroom options give you plenty of room to stretch out, with breathtaking views from your private deck, a fully equipped kitchen, and direct access to the water.

Lakeside Cottage

Two-Bedroom Lakeside Cottage

A Family-Favourite Retreat

Spread out and relax in our charming two-bedroom cottages. Just a short stroll from the water's edge, these cottages are perfect for families or small groups. Cook up a feast in your own kitchen, then unwind on the private deck as the sun sets over Lake Hume.

  • Two separate bedrooms, variety of bedding options
  • Fully equipped kitchen for home-cooked meals
  • Open-plan living & dining area
  • Private deck with stunning lake views
  • Walking trails & fishing spots on your doorstep
  • Direct access to water activities
Book This Cottage Enquire Now
Lakeside Cottage

Three-Bedroom Lakeside Cottage

The Ultimate Lake Escape

Perfect for larger families or groups, our three-bedroom cottages offer maximum comfort and flexibility. Enjoy spacious living areas, a full kitchen, and unbeatable lake views. Let the kids play, bring everyone together for a meal, and create unforgettable memories right by the water.

  • Three spacious bedrooms for families or couples
  • Fully equipped kitchen & open-plan living
  • Generous dining area — seats the whole group
  • Expansive private deck overlooking the lake
  • Direct access to resort activities & trails
  • Communal BBQ & fire pit nearby
Book This Cottage Enquire Now
Lakeside Cottage · Deluxe

Three-Bedroom Deluxe Cottage

Premium Space, Premium Views

Our Deluxe three-bedroom cottages offer an elevated experience for those who want the very best of lakeside living. Featuring premium finishes, a renovated bathroom, and a generous deck, this is the perfect choice for a special occasion or a group that deserves a little extra luxury.

  • Three spacious bedrooms with quality bedding
  • Renovated bathroom with premium fixtures
  • Fully equipped kitchen & spacious living area
  • Large private deck with lake views
  • Air conditioning & heating throughout
  • Direct access to resort amenities & water
